creator: romain@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Jose Alonso Cardenas Marquez from comment #17)

Switching from --enable-strip to --disable-strip on sope and sogo fixed the issue for me.

sope-5.1.1 Options        :
        LDAP           : on
        MEMCACHED      : on
        MYSQL          : off
        PGSQL          : on

sogo-5.1.1 Options        :
        ACTIVESYNC     : off
        MFA            : on
        SAML2          : off

openldap-sasl-server-2.4.59 Options        :
        ACCESSLOG      : on
        ACI            : off
        AUDITLOG       : on
        BDB            : off
        COLLECT        : on
        CONSTRAINT     : on
        DDS            : on
        DEBUG          : off
        DEREF          : off
        DNSSRV         : on
        DYNACL         : off
        DYNAMIC_BACKENDS: off
        DYNAMIC_MODULES: on
        DYNGROUP       : on
        DYNLIST        : on
        FETCH          : off
        GSSAPI         : off
        KQUEUE         : off
        LASTBIND       : off
        LMPASSWD       : off
        MDB            : on
        MEMBEROF       : on
        ODBC           : on
        OUTLOOK        : off
        PASSWD         : on
        PBKDF2         : off
        PCACHE         : on
        PERL           : off
        PPOLICY        : on
        REFINT         : on
        RELAY          : on
        RETCODE        : on
        RLOOKUPS       : off
        RWM            : on
        SASL           : on
        SEQMOD         : off
        SHA2           : off
        SHELL          : off
        SLAPI          : off
        SLP            : off
        SMBPWD         : off
        SOCK           : on
        SSSVLV         : on
        SYNCPROV       : on
        TCP_WRAPPERS   : off
        TRANSLUCENT    : on
        UNIQUE         : on
        VALSORT        : on

I think this is safe to commit, but with no experience in Objective C I would prefer for someone to approve this :-)
